caption: The video displays a static white screen against a black background. At the top of the white area, there is a red horizontal banner containing white text that reads "Test intuitive psych interventions: Roma". Directly below this banner, smaller black text states "#2: economic self-interest (World Bank)". These visual elements remain identical and unchanging across all four frames, with no movement, people, objects, or other graphical changes occurring. The scene is a consistent presentation of these specific text headings on a plain white background.
